channel.title: German Economic Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in German Economic Review

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Michele Ubaldi, Matteo Picchio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: A Note on the Optimal Speed of Transition: Aghion and Blanchard Revisited
item.description: Article by Michele Ubaldi, Matteo Picchio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0054

item.title: Trade Uncertainty, Economic Policy Uncertainty and Shipping Costs
item.description: Article by Michele Ubaldi, Matteo Picchio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0025

item.title: Intergenerational Scars: The Impact of Parental Unemployment on Individual Health Later in Life
item.description: Article by Michele Ubaldi, Matteo Picchio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0058
